business.title: PFC board clears next step for REC merger, seeks govt approval

The merger will be based on a share swap ratio determined by valuers, while ensuring the merged entity retains its government-company status.

entertainment.title: James Cameron shares new update on the future of the Avatar franchise: ‘I want to do them in ½ the time for ⅔ the cost’
entertainment.summary: James Cameron is exploring new technology and aiming to reduce costs in order to bring Avatar 4 and 5 to life. He said it might take a year to figure that out.

entertainment.summary: After Tamil actor Ravi Mohan alleged harassment at a press meet about his personal life, the internet seems divided between supporting him and Aarti Ravi.

entertainment.title: One of the most promising faces of the 1990s, co-starred with Aishwarya Rai: Where is Chandrachur Singh now?
entertainment.summary: Chandrachur Singh starred alongside Shah Rukh Khan and Aishwarya Rai in Mansoor Khan's 2000 film Josh. But a horrific accident changed his career forever.

entertainment.title: Yash defends decision to delay release of Toxic: ‘I have faith in my people…’
entertainment.summary: Actor Yash said he trusts his fans to understand the team’s decision to postpone the release of Toxic. The film was slated to release on June 4.
